---
name: Brain-training feedback
about: You used --mode brain-training for 30+ days and have signal to report.
title: "[brain-training] "
labels: brain-training
assignees: ''
---

## Usage profile

- Days using brain-training mode: _____
- Videos ingested in that period: _____
- Active-recall completion rate (from weekly digest): _____ %
- Speakers tracked: _____ total (core / emerging / prospect)

## What worked

What feature of the mode produced the largest behavior change in your learning? Be specific - "active recall" is too generic. "Q5 cross-graph synthesis question forced me to re-read 3 prior neurons every time" is useful.

## What did not work

What feature did you skip, ignore, or work around? Skipped features are signal that the design is wrong for your workflow, not that you are undisciplined. Report honestly.

## Cadence reality

What cadence did you actually sustain (vs the recommended 1-3 videos/day + daily review + Sunday digest)?

- Actual videos/day: _____
- Actual review minutes/day: _____
- Sunday digest read: every week / most weeks / rarely / never

## Compound effect

After 30+ days, do you notice any change in how you think about the topics you ingested? Concrete examples are valuable. The skill's claim is that the compound effect is invisible at 7 days and undeniable at 90.

## Recommended modifications

What would you change in the pipeline based on your experience? Reference specific sub-steps if possible.

## Privacy note

Do not paste vault content. Aggregate signal only.
